goal: Record successful DeepSeek transport-policy diagnostics as compact state evidence on demand and include them in protocol eval gates.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek transport-check --status 429 --error 'rate limit' --record --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Protocol eval records pass evidence for strict tool, thinking, and JSON checks but not the DeepSeek transport classification gate.
